title: こっちの戦いは苦手です

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new day, which means another day at the
academy. Just as the bell rings, a teacher enters
the classroom.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Okay, good morning, everyone. Let's get our
lesson started...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch, munch... Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Special Week, please don't eat right before class.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah... I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oversleepin' cost you your breakfast, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Well, it wasn't until late last night that I
remembered to do my homework...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, you went to sleep earlier than
usual last night... Did you do your homework, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hngh!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Those on duty today, please bring everyone's
homework to the staff room by lunch. I expect
you all to have completed it by then.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pheeew!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Honestly. You're really lucky, I hope you know
that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Both of you are hopeless. You should take a leaf
out of my book!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Behold, my perfectly completed homework...
Considering your dire straits, I suspect you would
love to have this in your possession.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're really something, King. I'm amazed.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Is that your answer for question three? I
got something else.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What? That can't be! I checked it over several
times... Look properly!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I put x = 3√7, 36, and... √2?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, you barely remember half of it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: King, you gotta show me your work!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, me too! I don't think I got mine right...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Everyone?

text_block_list.name: Spe & El
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Okay, we'll be reviewing everything covered in the homework, so please write down your own answers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The world of racing is tough, but the classroom
poses just as much of a challenge...
